info.name: Log Classifier API — synthetic_logs.csv schema
info.description: Two-stage log classification pipeline. All requests target localhost:8000.

request.description: Verify the pipeline is loaded and ready. Returns list of known labels.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Classify one log message. 'source' is optional.
Classify multiple log messages in one request.

response.name: 200 — all 9 labels covered
response.body:
{
  "total": 9,
  "classified": 9,
  "unclassified": 0,
  "results": [
    {"predicted_label": "HTTP Status",         "method_used": "regex"},
    {"predicted_label": "Resource Usage",       "method_used": "regex"},
    {"predicted_label": "System Notification",  "method_used": "regex"},
    {"predicted_label": "User Action",          "method_used": "regex"},
    {"predicted_label": "Security Alert",       "method_used": "regex"},
    {"predicted_label": "Critical Error",       "method_used": "svm"},
    {"predicted_label": "Error",                "method_used": "regex"},
    {"predicted_label": "Workflow Error",       "method_used": "llm"},
    {"predicted_label": "Deprecation Warning",  "method_used": "llm"}
  ]
}

request.description: Upload a CSV file with synthetic_logs.csv schema. Required column: log_message. Optional: timestamp, source. Returns a JSON summary; download the enriched CSV from endpoint 5.

formdata.description: Select your CSV file here (must have a log_message column)

response.name: 200 — Upload summary
response.body:
{
  "total_rows": 2410,
  "classified": 2403,
  "unclassified": 7,
  "label_distribution": {
    "HTTP Status": 1017,
    "Security Alert": 371,
    "System Notification": 356,
    "Error": 177,
    "Resource Usage": 177,
    "Critical Error": 161,
    "User Action": 144,
    "Workflow Error": 4,
    "Deprecation Warning": 3
  },
  "method_distribution": {
    "regex": 1694,
    "svm": 709,
    "llm": 7
  },
  "download_url": "/classify/export"
}

request.description: Download the enriched CSV from the last /classify/upload call. Columns: timestamp | source | log_message | predicted_label | confidence_score | method_used | training_status | classified_at
